title: 2023年度 第3回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Joe. It's Sarah.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Sarah. Where are you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: At the train station. Can you pick me up?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「迎えに来て」に1の「OK、今出る」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今出る」→正解。2「電話が新しい」→無関係。3「9時まで開いてる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is that a hamster?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I got it yesterday.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Does it have a name yet?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: No, I'm still thinking of one.
questions.explanation: 「名前はもうある？」に2の「まだ考え中」が適切。
highlights: Does it have a name yet
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「姉は猫が好き」→無関係。2「まだ考え中」→正解。3「お腹空いてない」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My speech is next.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Don't worry. You practiced hard.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: But I'm nervous.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「緊張する」に3の「うまくいくよ」が励ましとして適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校にいる」→無関係。2「静かすぎる」→無関係。3「うまくいくよ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are these your bags, ma'am?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Shall I take them to your room?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: No, I can carry them by myself.
No, I left them in my car.
questions.explanation: 「部屋まで持っていきましょうか？」に1の「自分で運べます」。
highlights: Shall I take them to your room
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自分で運べる」→正解。2「車に置いてきた」→目の前にある。3「ポケットが多い」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What are you making?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: A bookcase, Dad.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you need any help?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「手伝おうか？」に3の「大丈夫」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「その時暇」→不自然。2「また来る」→家にいる。3「大丈夫」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I heard you went to the new amusement park!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah! It was amazing!

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you ride the new roller coaster?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: No, I went to the park.
No, but I will next time.
questions.explanation: 「ジェットコースター乗った？」に3の「次回乗る」が自然。
highlights: Did you ride the new roller coaster
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「公園に行った」→すでに行った話。2「行ったことない」→行った。3「次回乗る」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm going skiing this weekend. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I have to work.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's too bad. See you on Monday.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「月曜に」に1の「楽しんで！」が自然な別れの挨拶。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「楽しんで」→正解。2「友達が行きたがってる」→不自然。3「もう買った」→何の話か不明。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I dropped my smartphone yesterday.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is it broken?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah, I think so.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Mine is only a year old.
You should buy a new one.
questions.explanation: 「壊れたと思う」に3の「新しいの買った方がいい」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「母に電話する」→無関係。2「私のは1年」→無関係。3「新しいのを買うべき」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are we getting close to the restaurant?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. It's just over there.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Should we cross the street here?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: No, there are too many cars.
questions.explanation: 「ここで渡る？」に1の「車が多すぎる」が適切。
highlights: Should we cross the street here
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「車が多い」→正解。2「タクシーに乗ろう」→もう近い。3「料理おいしかった」→まだ行ってない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To the park with my friends.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What will you do there?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何するの？」に3の「バスケする」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題終わった」→何をするかの答えでない。2「6時に帰る」→時間の答え。3「バスケする」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: There will be a fashion show in town next month.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. We should get tickets.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, I'll do that today. I can buy them on the Internet.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great.

questions.question: What is the woman going to do today?
questions.explanation: 「今日チケットを買う」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「パソコンを買う」→ネットで買う。2「チケットを買う」→正解。3「ファッションショー」→来月。4「市役所」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went to that new café yesterday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh, did you try their carrot cake? It's delicious.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I had cheesecake, and my wife had apple pie.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Those sound good, too.

questions.question: What did the man have at the café?
questions.explanation: 「チーズケーキを食べた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「チーズケーキ」→正解。2「キャロットケーキ」→勧められたが食べてない。3「アップルパイ」→妻。4「チェリーパイ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to visit my grandparents this summer.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you see them often, Beth?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Only twice a year, but I call them every month.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I never call mine.

questions.question: How often does Beth see her grandparents?
questions.explanation: 「年に2回だけ」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「全くない」→男性の電話。2「年1回」→言及なし。3「年2回」→正解。4「毎月」→電話の頻度。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Have you tried the new French restaurant?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. The food is really good.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is it expensive?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not at all. It's nice and quiet, too.

questions.question: What does the man think about the French restaurant?
questions.explanation: 「料理が本当に美味しい」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「料理が美味しい」→正解。2「うるさい」→静かと言っている。3「高い」→全然高くないと否定。4「古い」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you doing anything special for the winter holiday?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm going to New York with my mom.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What will you do there?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We'll visit my aunt. She works at an art museum there.

questions.question: Who will the boy visit in New York?
questions.explanation: 「叔母を訪ねる」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「母」→一緒に行く。2「父」→言及なし。3「叔母」→正解。4「アーティスト」→美術館で働く。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, can we go to the movies tonight?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Maybe. Have you finished your homework?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I did it after school in the library.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. Let's go after we eat dinner.

questions.question: What will they do tonight?
questions.explanation: 「夕食後に映画に行こう」。
highlights: Let's go after we eat dinner
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「テレビ」→映画。2「映画を見る」→正解。3「図書館」→放課後。4「宿題をチェック」→終わっている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It's raining. Can I wear this jacket?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. Do you need to borrow an umbrella, too?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, thanks. I have one.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll get my hat, and then we can go.

questions.question: What does the woman ask the man to do?
questions.explanation: 「このジャケット着ていい？」→ジャケットを貸して。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「傘を買う」→借りるか聞かれた。2「ジャケットを貸す」→正解。3「帽子を取る」→男性自身の。4「カバンを見つける」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sonia, is that Mark's car?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. It belongs to his father.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's really nice!

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. My mother wants one like it, too.

questions.question: Whose car are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 「マークの父の車」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ソニアの」→言及なし。2「ソニアの母」→欲しがっている。3「マークの」→父のもの。4「マークの父」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, John! Did you walk to work today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. I took the bus. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I rode my bike.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's nice.

questions.question: How did the woman get to work?
questions.explanation: 「自転車で来た」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車」→正解。2「歩いた」→男性に聞いた。3「電車」→言及なし。4「バス」→男性。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's go to the beach this Saturday!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I can't. I need to help my mother again.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Does she need help in her garden?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. We're painting her kitchen.

questions.question: Why can't the man go to the beach?
choices: He has to help his mother.
He has to cook for a party.
He has to work in his garden.
He has to clean his house.
questions.explanation: 「母を手伝わないといけない」。
highlights: I need to help my mother
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「母を手伝う」→正解。2「パーティー料理」→言及なし。3「庭の仕事」→否定。4「掃除」→ペンキ塗り。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This afternoon, I watched a great TV show about a zoo in America. I called my friend Ben to tell him about it. He said that it sounded interesting.

questions.question: Why did the girl call Ben?
choices: To tell him about a TV show.
To invite him to a zoo.
questions.explanation: 「テレビ番組のことを伝えるために電話した」。
highlights: I called my friend Ben to tell him about it
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お礼」→言及なし。2「アメリカについて聞く」→伝える側。3「テレビ番組を伝える」→正解。4「動物園に誘う」→テレビの話。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Karen is a high school student. On weekends, her friends like to go shopping or play sports, but Karen likes to volunteer at the city museum. She enjoys meeting new people and showing them around the museum.

questions.question: What does Karen do on weekends?
questions.explanation: 「博物館でボランティアする」。
highlights: Karen likes to volunteer at the city museum
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スポーツ」→友達。2「買い物」→友達。3「友達と勉強」→言及なし。4「博物館でボランティア」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Stanley went to watch a baseball game after work yesterday. It was his first time to go to the city stadium. He couldn't find it, so he asked a police officer for help.

questions.question: What was Stanley's problem?
choices: He couldn't find a police officer.
questions.explanation: 「スタジアムが見つからなかった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スタジアムが見つからない」→正解。2「チケットをなくした」→言及なし。3「警察官が見つからない」→聞いた。4「閉まっていた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I met Jason when I was 19 years old. We started a band together when we were 21. We've been in the same band for 10 years. He's a great drummer.

questions.question: When did the woman start a band with Jason?
questions.explanation: 「21歳の時にバンドを結成した」。
highlights: We started a band together when we were 21

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Fred is looking forward to tonight because his grandmother is coming to visit. This morning, he helped his mother to clean the house. At six, they will go to the airport to meet his grandmother.

questions.question: What is Fred looking forward to?
questions.explanation: 「祖母が来るのを楽しみにしている」。
highlights: his grandmother is coming to visit
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「祖母に会う」→正解。2「飛行機」→祖母が来る。3「掃除」→もうした。4「空港の仕事」→迎えに行く。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My friend from Brazil is coming to visit me! I want to take him to a famous restaurant, but he doesn't want to go. He likes baseball, so I bought us tickets for a game instead!

questions.question: What will the man and his friend do?
questions.explanation: 「野球の試合のチケットを買った」。
highlights: I bought us tickets for a game
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「有名レストラン」→友人が嫌がった。2「ブラジルに旅行」→友人が来る。3「野球観戦」→正解。4「劇場」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: For today's lunch special, we have chicken soup with a sandwich and salad. Our noodles with tomato sauce are also very good. Both meals come with a coffee or juice.

questions.question: What is the man talking about?
questions.explanation: レストランのランチメニューを説明している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家族の夕食」→レストラン。2「スーパーのセール」→レストラン。3「レストランのメニュー」→正解。4「庭仕事」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: On Saturdays, I clean my house in the morning and then visit my dad in the afternoon. On Sundays, I take my dog to the park after lunch and then go to the gym.

questions.question: What does the woman do on Saturday mornings?
questions.explanation: 「土曜の朝は家の掃除」。
highlights: On Saturdays, I clean my house in the morning
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「公園」→日曜。2「ジム」→日曜。3「父を訪ねる」→土曜午後。4「家の掃除」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I've been to Europe. I went once on a school trip and then three years later for vacation. I've also been there for two business trips.

questions.question: How many times has the man been to Europe on business?
questions.explanation: 「2回の出張で行った」。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My classes start at eight o'clock. I have to wake up at six and get on the train to school at seven. If I miss the train, I'll be late.

questions.question: When does the girl get on the train to school?
questions.explanation: 「7時の電車に乗る」。
highlights: get on the train to school at seven
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「6時」→起床時間。2「7時」→正解。3「8時」→授業開始。4「9時」→言及なし。
